title: PR#123 add token expiry check to auth
abstract:
diff --git a/src/auth.py b/src/auth.py
@@ -38,6 +38,12 @@ def verify_token(tok):
     payload = decode(tok)
+    if payload.get('exp', 0) < now():
+        raise TokenExpired()
     return payload

test output: 12 passed, 0 failed in 3.4s
coverage: src/auth.py 91.2% (was 88.0%)
files changed: src/auth.py, tests/test_auth.py
